Package net.apartium.cocoabeans.spigot.schematic

Interface SpigotSchematicPlacer

@AvailableSince("0.0.46") public interface SpigotSchematicPlacer
Interface for placing schematic blocks in Spigot.

Provides methods to place blocks according to schematic data and retrieve block data from the world.

Since:
0.0.46

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockData
    getBlockData(org.bukkit.block.Block block)
    Retrieves schematic block data from the given Bukkit block.
    static SpigotSchematicPlacer
    getInstance()
    Returns the singleton instance of SpigotSchematicPlacer.
    void
    place(org.bukkit.block.Block block, net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockPlacement placement)
    Places a block in the world according to the given BlockPlacement.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      static SpigotSchematicPlacer getInstance()
      Returns the singleton instance of SpigotSchematicPlacer.

      This instance is provided by CocoaSchematicInstantiator.

      Returns:
      the schematic placer instance

    • place

      void place(org.bukkit.block.Block block, net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockPlacement placement)
      Places a block in the world according to the given BlockPlacement.
      Parameters:
      block - the Bukkit block to place
      placement - the placement data describing how to place the block

    • getBlockData

      net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockData getBlockData(org.bukkit.block.Block block)
      Retrieves schematic block data from the given Bukkit block.
      Parameters:
      block - the Bukkit block
      Returns:
      the schematic block data
